message:
feat(core): implement differential snapshot system (wa-3kxe.3)

Replace the empty stub with a full differential snapshot engine:
- DirtyTracker: field-granularity change tracking (scrollback, metadata, created, closed)
- SnapshotDiff enum: 5 diff record types for incremental state changes
- DiffChain: ordered diff chain from base snapshot with restore-at-seq and compaction
- DiffSnapshotEngine: captures only dirty panes, auto-compacts on chain length
- 33 unit tests + 3 proptest properties (restore correctness, compaction fidelity, dirty count)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
